title: Memory wall
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''memory wall''' was a huge wall located near the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] naval base on the capital world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This wall bore the names, etched in stone, of the brave individuals of all services who died during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. This edifice served as a constant reminder to civilians and members of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] alike of what those who came before them gave up in order to achieve the freedom the galaxy possessed after the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Behind the scenes==
The description of the wall is reminiscent of the real-world [[Wikipedia:Vietnam Veterans Memorial|Vietnam Veterans Memorial]] located in [[Wikipedia:Washington DC|Washington, D.C]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
